title: Spaghetti Alla Carbonara (known as Bacon Pasta in our home)
ingredients: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
¾ cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
instructions: Heat large pot of salted water.  Add spaghetti and cook.  In a large skillet, combine the chicken broth, garlic, butter, and bacon.  Bring the mixture to a boil, turn to low simmer, season with salt and pepper.  When spaghetti cooked al dente, drain, Add sauce to pasta, then egg yolks and Parmesan cheese.  Serve immediately.
Brenton’s favorite! A “breakfast is perfect” pasta!
